items.claim: Gamrot has a history of inconsistent performance, beating fighters he is expected to lose to and losing to fighters he is expected to beat.
items.quote: he's almost a Michael Johnson type fighter in the sense like he sometimes beats guys you don't think he will and then he loses the guys you think he'll beat.

items.claim: Gamrot's loss to Charles Oliveira was a one-sided defeat.
items.quote: the Olivivera loss was like he got [ __ ] run over

items.claim: Beneil Dariush was near the end of his career when he fought Gamrot.
items.quote: Derush is like you know really close to being done

items.claim: Arman Tsarukyan possesses high-level striking skills.
items.quote: we know his striking is good, right? The NASA hack is a great example.

items.claim: The current matchup against Gamrot is a very difficult stylistic test for Arman Tsarukyan.
items.quote: this might be the worst matchup for him.
